title: Guru Nanak Khalsa College Karnal Recruitment 2026, Notification Out, Apply Online -

vacancy_details.eligibility: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree in a relevant subject from a recognized university with at least 55% marks. They must also have passed the UGC/CSIR NET or SLET/SET exam.However, Ph.D. holders are exempted from NET/SLET/SET as per UGC regulations.SC/ST and PWD candidates will be given a 5% relaxation in their Master’s degree.

how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://www.gnkckarnal.ac.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
